2606.23391.title: Distribution-Aware Diffusion-LLM for Robust Ultra-Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
2606.23391.paper_summary: Time series forecasting is a fundamental machine learning task. Recent work has explored Large Language Models (LLMs) for this purpose due to their strong generalization, pattern recognition, and zero-shot or few-shot capabilities. Despite their suitability for long-context learning, LLMs face challenges in multimodal settings: they lack calibrated probabilistic modeling for non-text data and struggle to align heterogeneous representations. To address these issues, we propose a new framework Diffusion-LLM that integrates a conditional diffusion model into an LLM-based forecasting pipeline. This joint design enables learning the conditional distribution of future data while improving semantic alignment in a shared latent space. We evaluate Diffusion-LLM on six long-term forecasting benchmarks, including ETT, Weather, and ECL. Our method consistently outperforms existing LLM-based baseline, achieving notable gains in ultra-long-term and few-shot forecasting and demonstrating the value of distribution-aware regularization for enhancing robustness and generalization in time series LLMs.
2606.23391.paper_summary_zh: 時間序列預測是一項基本的機器學習任務。近期的研究探討了大型語言模型（LLMs）在這方面的應用，因為它們具有強大的泛化能力、模式識別能力以及零樣本或少樣本學習的能力。儘管LLMs適合長上下文學習，但在多模態環境中仍面臨挑戰：它們缺乏對非文本數據的校準概率建模，並且在對齊異質表示方面存在困難。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了一個新的框架Diffusion-LLM，將條件擴散模型整合到基於LLM的預測管道中。這種聯合設計使得能夠學習未來數據的條件分佈，同時改善共享潛在空間中的語義對齊。我們在六個長期預測基準上評估了Diffusion-LLM，包括ETT、Weather和ECL。我們的方法在超長期和少樣本預測中始終超越現有的基於LLM的基準，並顯著提高了時間序列LLMs的穩健性和泛化能力，展示了分佈感知正則化的價值。
2606.23391.author: Falguni Ghosh et.al.
2606.23391.authors: Falguni Ghosh, Vahid Hashemi, Bernhard Kainz
